name: MCP4461 Component
description: The MCP4461 output component exposes 8 MCP4461 (wiper-)channels of a global [MCP4461](https://esphome.io/components/output/mcp4461#mcp4461-component) as float outputs.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Choose the channel of this MCP4461 output component. One of `A`, `B`, `C`, `D`, `E`, `F`, `G` or `H`.

config_entries.label: Mcp4461 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [MCP4461](https://esphome.io/components/output/mcp4461#mcp4461-component). Use this if you have multiple MCP4461 ICs you want to use at the same time.

config_entries.label: Initial Value
config_entries.description: Set initial wiper value, valid range is `0 - 1.0`

config_entries.label: Terminal A
config_entries.description: Set to `false` if terminal "A" shall be disabled on boot. Defaults to `true`

config_entries.label: Terminal B
config_entries.description: Set to `false` if terminal "B" shall be disabled on boot. Defaults to `true`

config_entries.label: Terminal W
config_entries.description: Set to `false` if terminal "W" shall be disabled on boot. Defaults to `true`
